title: arenaria norvegica subsp. norvegica
intro: Arenaria norvegica subsp. norvegica, also known as Norwegian sandwort, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Norwegian sandwort include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Norwegian sandwort are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
